svg.text: VetCare Mobile App — Figma Mock UI Kit
Based on the uploaded system specification: farmer, veterinarian, AI diagnosis, booking, payment, reports, heatmap, farm and vaccination management.
Add, edit, and monitor animal status
Goat G08: reduced appetite logged today
Search by GPS, specialty, fee and rating
High fever, low appetite, watery eyes,
Recommendation: book a vet if symptoms persist.
No raw card data stored in the app.
High-risk zone needs admin approval before alert.
Diagnosis form locked until consultation completed.
Then enter disease, severity, prescription and follow-up.
